scope_assessment: EX/engagement-coordination role (Job Family: Engagement & Culture). Genuine fit anchors: oversee employee-feedback surveys + manage employee-turnover dashboards & analyze trends/drivers (Jamie's data-analysis + EX wheelhouse). Also event planning, onboarding logistics, NEO, swag, dept budget, Slack FAQs. Leans coordination-heavy vs strategic OD, but legitimately P3-EX scope. NOT recruiting/payroll/benefits/ER-casework/sales. Low YOE bar (Associate's required; 2+ yrs customer service; HR a plus). Salary $53-60k (just under Jamie's $55-75k floor).
hard_stop_scan: PASS — no 'no visa sponsorship' clause, no ITAR/US-Person requirement, not ER/payroll-primary. Sponsorship is the real open question (Aptive = private pest-control co, not a known H1B sponsor) but per rules only explicit no-sponsor is a hard stop.
fit_verdict: STRETCH / apply — engagement-coordination role with real survey+dashboard EX anchors; sponsorship unconfirmed but not blocked
notes: Workday instance allowed full apply WITHOUT upfront account creation (account offered only post-submit, declined). LinkedIn 'Apply on company website' churned tabs; reached canonical ATS via careers.aptivepestcontrol.com -> aptive.wd1.myworkdayjobs.com.
